body_txt: While the Cultured Badass and Wicked Cultured listen to Tchaikovsky and Wagner , and read Nietzsche in their spare time, the Pop-Cultured Badass rocks out to the latest hits on their iPod and discusses their interpretation of recent movies. They may very well engage in discussing tropes and Conversational Troping , and weaponising their media awareness to analyse and solve problems . They’re also very prone to being Sophisticated as Hell . Contrast Cultured Badass and Wicked Cultured . Sometimes the eponymous bunny ears of a Bunny-Ears Lawyer .
